description_long: This is a modern duplex house with two distinct living units separated by a central driveway and garage area. The structure features flat roofs, large glass windows, and a combination of brick and light-colored paneling on the exterior walls. Each unit has its own private garden space, visible at the rear, with outdoor seating and recreational areas. The front facade is characterized by prominent balconies with blue-tinted glass railings and a symmetrical arrangement of windows and doors. The property is enclosed by a low brick wall and surrounded by well-maintained greenery, providing privacy and a sense of exclusivity. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern duplex house with flat roofs, large glass windows, and private gardens, separated by a central driveway and garage. The exterior features brick and light paneling, blue-tinted balconies, and is enclosed by a low brick wall with lush greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, central driveway, garages, and prominent balconies with blue-tinted glass railings.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the private gardens, outdoor seating areas, and the separation between the two living units.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back patios, garden spaces, and the full width of the house with its flat roof and large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side/rear view focusing on the secondary garden, outdoor amenities, and the rear entrances to each unit.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Central driveway with two garage doors, individual front doors recessed under balconies, and minimalistic steps leading to each entry
